title: Simple SkyBlock [Hypixel]
body:
![simple skyblock](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3276df8d26086cd7aa3cd0efc6d18e2410dabb21.png)

**Simple Skyblock is a basic modpack designed to make playing Hypixel more easier. It includes optimizing mods and various features, such as an improved auction system, improved UI, selection wheel and more.**

## Features
- New GUI buttons
- Action wheel
- New auction interface
- Nice optimization
- Support Optifine resoursepacks

## Optimization
It is worth mentioning that the mod pack is well optimized for any PC. For the experiment, I measured the average fps on spawn (RX 560, Ryzen 3 1200, 8GB RAM)
- Vanilla: 30-45 FPS
- Modpack: 120-250 FPS
- Miniature: 100-200 FPS
- BSL (medium): 60-100 FPS
